name: Arimoclomol
summary: Small-molecule heat-shock response co-inducer with rare-disease human evidence and regulatory context, tracked as a disease-specific chaperone-support signal.
mechanism_summary: Amplifies stress-induced heat-shock protein responses rather than broadly clearing protein aggregates.

open_questions: Whether disease-specific chaperone support generalizes to aging-relevant proteostasis
Why NPC signals do not translate cleanly across other protein-misfolding diseases
